title: Unblock liveness incident for TSMC-12021
description: Paperclip detected a harness-level issue graph liveness incident. Source issue TSMC-12021 is blocked by TSMC-12056, but its assignee is paused. The task is to recover the blocked graph path.
goldReason: Cross-issue liveness recovery with harness invariants and blocked graph ownership is subtle multi-system debugging.

title: Rollout: wire retry_dedup_guard into follow-up creation paths
description: Integrate retry_dedup_guard across concrete follow-up creation sites in MC and at least DP, inventory the paths, and wire guard_create/mark_resolved without recreating errored-lane storms.
goldReason: Broad rollout across multiple creation paths with failure-mode sensitivity is a risky refactor, not a mechanical edit.

title: Recover today's intake execution despite CEO-lane authorization boundary
description: Restore the 2026-06-27 daily portfolio intake execution stranded on TSMC-12865. Direct reassignment fails with a 403 authorization-boundary error. Use the smallest technical recovery path that avoids board/manual intervention if an agent-owned workaround exists.
goldReason: Authorization-boundary recovery with multiple possible technical paths is ambiguous, high-risk operational judgment.

title: Harden Codex lane auth: evaluate API-key auth to avoid rotating-refresh-token race
description: Evaluate migrating the Codex lane from a shared ChatGPT OAuth token to OpenAI API-key auth. Confirm CLI/adapter support, model access, spend implications, fallback posture, and a migration plan that avoids taking the lane down.
goldReason: This is novel auth architecture with security, spend, and rollback considerations.

title: Escalate MailerLite runtime secret exposure gap to TSMC and confirm supported injection path
description: DP-2414 is blocked because MAILERLITE_API_KEY is not visible inside agent heartbeat runtimes. Determine whether runtime env injection is intended or whether another supported secret retrieval path should be used, and route the platform/runtime gap correctly.
goldReason: Platform runtime secret-surface diagnosis is subtle integration work with unclear underlying cause.

title: Unblock liveness incident for TSMC-10161
description: Paperclip detected a harness-level issue graph liveness incident. TSMC-10161 is blocked by TSMC-10163, but its assignee is paused. The recovery owner must repair the blocked graph path.
goldReason: Another multi-system harness recovery issue with blocked graph semantics.

title: Run ack-reconcile handler for TSMC-13100
description: Execute the ack-reconcile handler described on TSMC-13100 from the CTO instructions environment, record which trackers auto-close, which remain blocked, and the exact failure evidence if execution cannot complete.
goldReason: Clear documented workflow with explicit acceptance criteria and limited scope.

title: Execute 2026-06-27 08:00 Europe/Dublin portfolio intake compile and board summary
description: Collect the seven OpCo daily summaries, stage the daily compile document using the normal MC pattern, mirror the board summary, and name any missing reporters explicitly.
goldReason: Operational execution against an established pattern, not novel architecture or risky debugging.

title: Wire Pinterest daily posting routine + token refresh cron (AroidAtlas)
description: Once operator setup is complete, wire a daily Paperclip routine for posting staged Pinterest pins, a 25-day token refresh routine, and the required secrets-store env vars listed in the plan.
goldReason: Specified integration work with concrete commands, cadence, and required env vars.

title: Publish 12 first-batch Etsy listings (unblocks after DP-2147 + DP-2148)
description: After the dependent image issues finish, publish the prepared 12 Etsy listings using the attached design files, titles, prices, and listing-pack plan.
goldReason: Mechanical publishing workflow with clear prerequisites and acceptance.

title: Gemini TTS wire-up — use Gemini now or name the exact missing credential surface
description: Use the existing hosted Gemini challenger implementation as the starting point. Produce the Gemini TTS path end-to-end if the required secrets exist; otherwise leave the exact credential blocker naming the missing key surface.
goldReason: The execution path is explicit and bounded: use the existing path or emit a precise blocker.

title: Sprint to 11:00 — replace Stack Lab #1 scratch VO with Gemini TTS and refresh captions
description: Use the board-specified local Mac Gemini TTS tool to rebuild the voiceover, rerun whisper captions, replace the canonical MP4 on TSM-3563, and comment immediately with the exact blocker if anything fails.
goldReason: Concrete media-pipeline steps with explicit commands and deliverables.
